3201040.name: Anasozas: Another Surreal World
3201040.description:
An ISEKAI, RPG, CRAFTING GAME!?

You and your best friend got transported to another world!!

Obtain Skills that give you resistances, strengths, allow you mine, allow you to build, use crazy fighting moves, synthesize items from nova, craft anything and even fly.

Battles are Turn Based with attack patterns, physically, you are weak, but you have found mysterious shields of dark and light that can block any attack.

Block any attack in 6 directions with WASDQE and IJKLUO controlling Kurome and Ensho separately.

Explore a heavily vertical 3D world from a comfortable 2D top down perspective, the skies and underground are not out of reach!

The world gets more extreme and violent the further away from the plains you travel thanks to the force called "nova".

Sadism is rampant in this world where anyone can level up, how will you influence this world with your power?

Your actions will effect everyone in this new world...
